heuristics.diagnosis: Pipeline underutilized. Check for cache misses, branch mispredictions, or memory stalls.
suggestions: Inspect l1d_miss_rate and llc_miss_rate for cache pressure.
Check for AVX-512 downclocking if using heavy SIMD paths.
Verify prefetch hints in hot loops (rte_prefetch0/1/2).
Review data structure layout for cache line alignment (64B).
Consider software prefetching in packet processing loops.
Check for false sharing on per-core data structures.

heuristics.diagnosis: Execution stalled on backend (memory, divides, long-latency ops).
suggestions: Look for division/modulo in hot paths — replace with shifts/masks.
Check NUMA locality of hugepage allocations.
Use branchless techniques (cmov, bitwise ops) in hot paths.
Check for unpredictable branches in packet classification.

notes: Use generic events (cycles, instructions) as fallback for unknown CPU models.
PEBS (Precise Event-Based Sampling) available on Intel for precise sampling.
Watch for AVX-512 frequency throttling when profiling SIMD-heavy code.
For DPDK: verify rte_memcpy uses the SSE/AVX-optimized variant at compile time.
